name: corebridge-security-platform
description: Monorepo: Cyber Security website + headless CMS

scripts.dev: concurrently -n website,cms-api,cms-admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w website" "npm run dev -w @corebridge/cms-backend" "npm run dev -w @corebridge/cms-admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @corebridge/shared && npm run build -w @corebridge/cms-backend && npm run build -w @corebridge/cms-admin && npm run build -w website
